name: NZXT C750 Gold Core 750W Fully Modular ATX 3.1 Power Supply - 80 PLUS Gold Certified - Cybenetics Platinum - 135mm FDB Fan with Zero RPM Mode - 12V-2x6 PCIe 5.1 Connector (300W) - 2x PCIe 6+2-pin Connectors (PA-7G3BB-US)
